TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Chet_Allen_(actor,_born_1939), title = Chet_Allen_(actor,_born_1939), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chet_Allen_(actor,_born_1939)} }

S.FORM: Chet Allen kawas tay 1939, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 5, Chet Allen, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1984) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors Chet Allen1950 kawas ga Amirika laqi stzwyaw qani. Chet Allen htgan na ryax Chillicothe, Ohio,suru musa beh Columbus, Ohio. 1984 kawas niqun iyu' mhoqil la.

Chet Allen kawas tay 1939, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 5, Chet Allen, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1984) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors Chet Allen1950 kawas ga Amirika laqi stzwyaw qani. Chet Allen htgan na ryax Chillicothe, Ohio,suru musa beh Columbus, Ohio. 1984 kawas niqun iyu' mhoqil la.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħet allen kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨħet allen, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ ʦ~ʨħet allen**** kawas~ɕ ɣa amirika laqi s~ɕtzwjaw qani. ʦ~ʨħet allen ħtɣan na rjax ʦ~ʨħilliʦ~ʨotħe, oħio,s~ɕuru mus~ɕa βeħ ʦ~ʨolumβus~ɕ, oħio. **** kawas~ɕ niqun ijuʔ mħoqil la.
